title: Decision Log
summary: Consolidated ADR set of 58 numbered decisions (D-01…D-58) for a Blazor/PostgreSQL drawing-canvas web app, each with status, rationale, and rejected alternatives.
scope: cross-tab live sync / broadcast message contract
notes: Manifest-declared ADR set; type not re-derived. Single-file ADR set, not one-decision-per-file. STALENESS MAP (from the file's own 'READ THIS FIRST' status index — superseded content must NOT be extracted as current): D-05 amended by D-13; D-07 'no HTTP code' claim retracted by D-34; D-11 'idempotent upsert' is a bug, amended by D-40/D-47/D-53/D-54; D-12 DDL sketch stale, use 'THE SCHEMA'; D-15 Delete-key superseded by D-33; D-16 superseded by D-30/D-33 (six toolbar buttons, not four); D-22 REVERSED — the REVISED inscribed-square version is authoritative (earlier centre+rim-point encoding is dead); D-23 'one shared guard' retracted by D-50; D-30 says five buttons, it is six (D-33). AUTHORITATIVE ARTIFACTS: the 'THE SCHEMA' section (canonical DDL, ~line 1674), D-22 (geometry storage, revised), D-53 (sync message contract). Entries are not in file order past D-32 (D-35/D-36/D-37 appear late). All D-entries carry explicit Status lines; every non-stale entry is Locked, hence locked: true for the set. No external document cross-references — the file states it is the only specification. Filename deviates from {slug}-{source_hash}.json: no shell/hashing tool available in this agent's toolset, so a path-derived suffix ('docs') was used; collision risk is nil for this unique filename.
